summary_en: 45,000 shares (2.4% of shares outstanding), ¥101.07M upper limit. ToSTNeT-3 on May 18, 2026 at ¥2,246/share reference price. Single trading session order.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Asahimatsu Foods announced on May 15, 2026 that its board has authorized the acquisition of up to 45,000 treasury shares (2.4% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum of ¥101.07 million. The purchase will be executed via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading on May 18, 2026 at a reference price of ¥2,246 per share during a single trading session in the morning. The order is valid only for that specified time window. The stated rationale is to improve capital efficiency and enable flexible capital allocation in response to changing business conditions. Results will be announced immediately after the trading session closes.
